_doc_settings_json: settings.json is DELIBERATELY ABSENT from .files — it is user-owned config the installer never symlink-deploys. On `install` (NOT `agents-only`, which skips it), wire_hooks performs an idempotent, timestamped-backup MERGE that adds ONLY the Atrium hook event-bindings below into ~/.claude/settings.json — it never deletes or overwrites user-owned keys, and re-running is a no-op once the bindings are present. Run `glass-atrium doctor` to surface any DORMANT (deployed-but-unwired) hook bindings. Required bindings the doctor checks (16 total, matcher-scoped — the same hook may bind under TWO matchers, each tracked independently): PreToolUse{enforce-delegation@Write|Edit, enforce-verification-gate@Agent, validate-secret-scan@Write|Edit, validate-secret-scan@Bash, validate-prompt@Write|Edit, advisory-spawn-cost@Agent, advisory-spawn-budget@Agent, advisory-context-budget@Agent, enforce-workflow-verify-stage@Workflow, lint-workflow-template-literal@Workflow, advisory-subagent-budget@(no matcher)}; PostToolUse{validate-output@(no matcher), validate-tool-response@WebFetch|WebSearch|mcp__.*(fetch|get|read|search).*, detect-secret-file-write@Bash}; SessionStart{validate-compliance-matrix}; Stop{cost-tracker}. Note validate-secret-scan binds under BOTH Write|Edit AND Bash (the Bash channel scans shell-command secret leaks).
